risks: History feature scope creep: reading ALL directive.json files for history + building a selector UI could balloon. Keep it simple.
Cross-page integration means touching 3 different component trees with different design systems (pixel-art vs shadcn).
CEO action buttons require wiring to state updates. CompletionGateBanner pattern exists for completion — generalize for approve step.
over_engineering_flags: 14 step-specific icons is a static map, not architecture. No concern.
History: simple list is 80% of value. No filtering/search needed.
Artifact links: display file paths as text is sufficient.
challenges.recommendation: Proceed. 8 problems are real and well-scoped. 2 projects: server data → frontend overhaul.

projects.title: Pipeline server: skipped steps + directive history
projects.scope_summary: Fix buildPipelineFromDirective to keep skipped steps (change .filter to .map with status=skipped). Extend DirectiveWatcher to expose ALL directives (not just active) via a new directiveHistory array in the aggregator/WS payload. Ensure title field populates from directive.json.

projects.title: Pipeline stepper UX overhaul: icons, actions, history, cross-page
projects.scope_summary: Complete frontend overhaul: step-specific icons, skipped-step visuals, inline CEO action buttons, clickable artifact links, directive history section, visual polish, title not slug, fix Projects page and Game UI integration.
